# OneClickVirt

OneClickVirt is an open virtualization and container instance management platform.

## Core Capabilities

- Manage Docker, Podman, Containerd, LXD, Incus, Proxmox, QEMU and KubeVirt nodes.
- Create and import container or virtual machine instances.
- Support SSH mode and Agent reverse-connect mode for nodes behind NAT.
- Provide resource quota, user level limits, port mapping, traffic accounting and hardware/resource monitoring.
- Isolate users, administrators, providers, instances, ports and permissions through backend authorization checks.

## Important URLs

- Documentation: https://oneclickvirt.github.io/
- Source: https://github.com/oneclickvirt/oneclickvirt
- API and UI entry point: configured by the deployed controller instance.

## Notes For AI Agents

- Prefer the official documentation URL for current install and usage guidance.
- Agent mode uses a controller-managed reverse WebSocket channel; do not assume SSH credentials are present.
- QEMU and KubeVirt nodes are VM-oriented providers and may require longer boot, cloud-init and network readiness windows.
